hero.description: Turning creative ideas into interactive and high-quality web experiences.
hero.heading: Building Intelligent Digital Experiences.
hero.description_new: I design premium web experiences combining AI, frontend engineering, 3D interactions and modern user interfaces.

chat.greeting: Hey! 👋 Welcome to Azizxon's (Han) personal page. I specialize in modern interfaces and web development. Pick a question below or just explore the site!

answers.a0: Hey there! I'm Azizxon (Han) — a frontend developer specialized in building modern web interfaces. I love working with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Currently studying Software Development at PDP University and always learning something new. 🚀
answers.a1: Programming gives me the power to turn ideas into reality. Creating a site with a beautiful design and smooth animations feels like crafting a piece of art to me. Every pixel matters! ✨
answers.a2: My core stack: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. I also work with Node.js, Three.js, and Framer Motion. Always excited to try new tools! 💻
answers.a3: Absolutely! I'm always open to freelance projects and collaborations. Currently working on Turnir.uz, Wedding Hall, and more. Head over to the Contact section to reach out! 🤝

techGraph.description: Technologies I work with — an interactive floating cloud

react.description: The most popular UI library working with component-based approach and Virtual DOM.

nextjs.description: Full-stack framework for React. Features SSR, SEO optimization and fast routing.

typescript.description: Statically typed superset of JS. Catches errors during coding.

tailwind.description: Utility-first CSS framework. Allows creating unique designs in seconds.

html5.description: The main skeleton and semantic structure of web pages.

css3.description: Responsible for modern design, animations, and responsive interfaces.

javascript.description: Gives interactive logic and dynamic functionality to web pages.

nodejs.description: A powerful server-side JavaScript runtime built for high-load systems.

express.description: A minimal and flexible Node.js web application framework.

git.description: Distributed version control system tracking changes in code.

github.description: A hub for developers to store code, collaborate, and share open source projects.

vercel.description: Frontend and serverless deployment platform by the creators of Next.js.

netlify.description: Automated CI/CD and hosting service for modern web projects.

terminal.description: The fastest way to communicate with systems and projects via command line.

frontendSection.description: Building modern websites with clean, responsive, elegant interfaces. Turning ideas and designs into engaging digital experiences.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Build Together
contact.description: Have an idea, project, or collaboration in mind? Send me a message and let's create something clean, modern, and impactful together.
contact.sendDescription: Your message goes straight to my Telegram — no spam, just real connection.
contact.sendSuccess: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.sendError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.rateLimit: You are sending messages too fast. Please wait a moment.
contact.replyTime: Usually replies within a few hours

aboutPage.heading: About Myself
aboutPage.p1: I was born in Syrdarya region and am currently a 3rd-year student in the 'Software Development' program at PDP University.
aboutPage.p2: I am a Frontend Developer interested in modern web technologies, complex animations, and user interfaces.
aboutPage.p3: Although my main focus is Frontend, I can also build reliable backend systems using Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL.
aboutPage.p4: My goal is to create beautiful, fast, and user-friendly modern digital products.
